headline: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates But Stock Drops
summary: Consumer products giant Clorox (NYSE:CLX) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales were flat year on year at $1.67 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.64 per share was 6.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) Q3 Results Fall Short as Cost Pressures Weigh on Outlook
summary: Clorox Q3 revenue missed estimates, missing the $1.683B target as demand softened. The company cut its full-year profit forecast due to rising costs, sending shares down 3.6% after hours.

headline: Clorox cuts annual profit forecast on weak demand for cleaning products
summary: Bleach maker Clorox cut its annual profit forecast on Thursday, hurt by weaker demand for its cleaning products as the impact of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran raises costs. Higher energy,...
